title: True strength of court lies in exceptional Bar: Justice K Babu bids farewell to Kerala High Court
description: The true strength of the Kerala High Court in its exceptionally efficient bar, Justice K Babu said on Friday in his retirement speech.Justice Babu highlighted the crucial role of lawyers in the functioning of courts and expressed his satisfaction with the younger generation of lawyers and their contribution to the profession."The true strength of our High Court lies in its efficient and erudite Bar. It is heartening to see a new generation of promising young lawyers, including many accomplished
